## Recommended Action

**Action:** Run Authority Research
**Target:** Kosttillskott säkerhet & behov (Clusters 7 & 8 from kosttillskott-gap.md)
**Slug:** N/A (authority research phase)
**Source:** kosttillskott-gap.md
**Source file:** N/A
**Authority:** BLOCKED — no authority research exists for these topic domains

**Rationale:**
Clusters 7 (Är kosttillskott farligt?) and 8 (Behöver jag kosttillskott?) are the two most strategic articles for LevNytt's long-term credibility. Both are Priority A with Very High EEAT value and Very High long-term strategic value per the gap report. Neither has authority research. Running Authority Research now unlocks both articles and removes the blocker for the entire kosttillskott priority batch. After authority research completes, the Informational Article agent can proceed on Cluster 8 (Behöver jag kosttillskott?) as the highest-value untackled item, while Omega-3 portal guide (Cluster 2 in queue — already authority-cleared) can run in parallel.

## Warnings

- **kosttillskott-gap.md contains stale recommendations.** Clusters 12-15 overlap with already-published content from the global batch. The gap report predates batch completion and has not been updated. Review before actioning any kosttillskott cluster marked "Update existing."
- **18 content/articles/ files served via rewrite, not proper production.** These are accessible to users but not tracked as proper root HTML pages. Consider a formal publication pass when priority items are cleared.
- **No gap report exists for carotenoids, phytosterols, or zeaxanthin.** These articles were produced outside the gap-report system. Future articles in these domains lack a structured backlog entry.
- **Production-status.md is out of date.** Lists only the 25 global-batch items. Does not track the ~17 additional informational articles published outside that batch.

---

## Summary

The editorial engine is in good health. The global batch of 25 articles (2026-06-29) is 100% complete with all items published and QA-passed. The repository holds 85 published pages across products, informational articles, and pillar/authority content. The next frontier is the kosttillskott gap report — 20 clusters covering creatine, adaptogens, longevity, women's health, melatonin, collagen, supplement safety, and consumer decision-making. However, 8 of the highest-priority clusters are blocked on authority research. The recommended next step is to run Authority Research on the two most strategic topics (supplement safety and consumer need assessment) to unlock the Priority A pipeline. In parallel, the Omega-3 portal guide (authority-cleared) and MLM income disclosure article (authority-cleared) are ready for immediate production.
